programs.title: Would I Lie To You?
programs.sub_title: Mark Bonnar, Sheila Hancock, Stephen Mangan & Anita Rani
programs.desc: Rob Brydon hosts the award-winning comedy panel show with David Mitchell and Lee Mack as the lightning-quick team captains. Over the course of the show, celebrity guests reveal amazing stories about themselves, some of which are true and some of which are not. The aim of the game is to fool the opposition into mistaking fact for fiction and fiction for fact. The guests on this episode are Mark Bonnar, Sheila Hancock, Stephen Mangan and Anita Rani.

programs.title: Would I Lie To You?
programs.desc: Rob Brydon is back with Lee Mack and David Mitchell returning as the lightning-quick team captains. Helping sort the fact from the fiction are guests Gyles Brandreth, Will Kirk, Tasha Ghouri and Jessica Knappett.

programs.title: Gruen
programs.desc: Australia's favourite multi-award winning, multi-award losing, longest running, and most importantly, the only show about advertising is coming back for an 18th season.

programs.title: Planet America
programs.desc: Chas and John cover the latest from the Middle East, the Strait of Hormuz, the ceasefire and peace talks, plus King Charles' State Visit to mark the 250 years of American independence.

programs.title: Koala Man
programs.desc: Vicky bans soft drinks at school.

programs.title: ER
programs.desc: Susan fears for an architect whose degenerating eyesight makes him suicidal. The doctors suspect a mother is abusing her child. Elizabeth learns something shocking about Dr. Dorset and Morris is overwhelmed by life in the ER.
